## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Scene edits go through **commands** / the reducer—not ad hoc mutation of graph state from UI.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] For behavior changes, I added or updated **tests** (core reducer, export/serialization, or web as appropriate).
- [ ] I described any **intentionally uncovered** edge cases in the PR text.
